pages.title: Melt everything
pages.text: TAIGA registers melting recipes for every form of every material:$(br)$(item)Ingot$() → 144 mb$(br)$(item)Nugget$() → 16 mb$(br)$(item)Block$() → 1296 mb$(br)$(item)Ore$() → 288 mb (2× ingot, standard bonus)$(br)$(item)Crystal$() → 72 mb (tiberium/dilithium only)

pages.title: Temperatures
pages.text: Each material has its own melt temperature baked into its fluid definition — expect the TC3 smeltery to need progressively more fuel tiers as you climb the material tree.$(br2)Standard Seared Bricks + a single Melter will handle most TAIGA materials; the highest-tier alloys may require Scorched Bricks.
